programme.title: Nice vs Cannes - Marmara Spike ligue Volleyball - 2026
programme.desc: France’s top men’s volleyball competition, the LNV Ligue A Masculine (Marmara SpikeLigue), delivers a season of elite clubs battling through a home-and-away league before the playoffs. Expect big serving, quick middle attacks, and high-level defense as teams chase points, seeding and the national title in a prime-time French showcase.

programme.title: Switzerland vs Germany - International Friendly - 2026
programme.desc: In the 54 previous international matches between Switzerland and Germany, Germany have celebrated four times as many wins and scored more than twice as many goals as the Swiss. Germany have played more international matches against Switzerland than any other opponent, including their first ever international on 5th April 1908. Germany have also celebrated more wins against Switzerland than any other opponent, while Switzerland have lost more often against Germany than any other side, only facing Italy more times.

programme.title: England vs Japan - International Friendly - 2026
programme.desc: England are unbeaten in their three games against Japan, beating them 2-1 in both June 1995 in the Umbro Cup and in a May 2010 friendly, while they shared a 1-1 draw in June 2004. An Asian nation has never previously beaten England in 10 attempts – this is England’s first game against an Asian team since a 6-2 win over IR Iran in November 2022 at the FIFA World Cup.

programme.title: Switzerland vs Germany - International Friendly - 2026
programme.desc: In the 54 previous international matches between Switzerland and Germany, Germany have celebrated four times as many wins and scored more than twice as many goals as the Swiss. Germany have played more international matches against Switzerland than any other opponent, including their first ever international on 5th April 1908. Germany have also celebrated more wins against Switzerland than any other opponent, while Switzerland have lost more often against Germany than any other side, only facing Italy more times.

programme.desc: England are unbeaten in their three games against Japan, beating them 2-1 in both June 1995 in the Umbro Cup and in a May 2010 friendly, while they shared a 1-1 draw in June 2004. An Asian nation has never previously beaten England in 10 attempts – this is England’s first game against an Asian team since a 6-2 win over IR Iran in November 2022 at the FIFA World Cup.

programme.title: Final - Day 7 - ATP 250 Fayez Sarofim & Co. U.S. Men’s Clay Court Championship
programme.desc: Staged in Houston, this is the only ATP clay event in North America and is played on American green clay, which is faster and lower bouncing than European red clay. The conditions favor big servers and first-strike tennis, making it a unique transition event into the clay-court season.

programme.title: Switzerland vs Germany - International Friendly - 2026
programme.desc: In the 54 previous international matches between Switzerland and Germany, Germany have celebrated four times as many wins and scored more than twice as many goals as the Swiss. Germany have played more international matches against Switzerland than any other opponent, including their first ever international on 5th April 1908. Germany have also celebrated more wins against Switzerland than any other opponent, while Switzerland have lost more often against Germany than any other side, only facing Italy more times.

programme.title: Switzerland vs Germany - International Friendly - 2026
programme.desc: In the 54 previous international matches between Switzerland and Germany, Germany have celebrated four times as many wins and scored more than twice as many goals as the Swiss. Germany have played more international matches against Switzerland than any other opponent, including their first ever international on 5th April 1908. Germany have also celebrated more wins against Switzerland than any other opponent, while Switzerland have lost more often against Germany than any other side, only facing Italy more times.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Manchester City have lost three of their last four UEFA Champions League games against Real Madrid, as many defeats as they suffered against them through their first 12 meetings in the competition. Real Madrid are looking to eliminate Manchester City from the UEFA Champions League knockout stages for a fifth time ; only Bayern Munich have been eliminated by an opponent on more than five occasions in the knockout stages of the competition.

programme.title: Chelsea vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Chelsea are winless in their last five UEFA Champions League games against Paris SG ; their joint-longest winless run against an opponent in the competition. Paris SG are unbeaten in their last five games against English teams in the UEFA Champions League, and could go six in a row without defeat against them in the competition for the first time here.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Newcastle United- UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Barcelona have won both of their previous home games against Newcastle United in the UEFA Champions League, beating them 1-0 in November 1997 and 3-1 in December 2002. Newcastle have lost five of their six away games against Spanish sides in all competitions, with this their first since a 2-1 loss at Deportivo de La Coruña in the 2005 UEFA Intertoto Cup. The only exception in this run was a 3-0 win at Mallorca in the 2003-04 UEFA Cup.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Galatasaray - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Having been unbeaten in their first three UEFA Champions League meetings with Galatasaray, Liverpool have now lost their last three against the Turkish side, though all three defeats have come away from home. Galatasaray have won just one of their 12 away games against English teams in all competitions, winning 3-2 at Manchester United in October 2023.

programme.title: Bolivie vs Suriname - Coupe du monde - QUALIFICATIONS - Football 2026
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Retour sur les matchs les plus passionnants et les plus marquants des eliminatoires de la Coupe du monde de la FIFA.

programme.title: Salon VIP - Magazine 2025-2026
programme.desc: Sport, Football, Sport magazine. Interviews exclusives de joueurs et temoignages de supporters passionnes : plongez dans les coulisses du football avec des points de vue d'inities, des histoires inedites et des debats enflammes autour du ballon rond. Host: Claire Arnoux.

programme.title: Man City vs Arsenal - Coupe de la Ligue Anglaise - F - Football 2025-2026
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Quatre-vingt-douze clubs anglais, issus de la Premier League et de l'EFL, s'affrontent dans ce tournoi intense. Chaque tour elimine des equipes, et c'est en finale que se decidera le champion.

programme.title: NBA Extra - Magazine 2025-2026
programme.desc: Sport, Sport magazine, Basketball. Plongez dans l'univers de la NBA comme jamais auparavant. Ce magazine vous offre un acces exclusif aux plus grandes stars de la ligue, des histoires inedites et les moments les plus spectaculaires qui font vibrer la planete basket.

programme.title: New York Knicks vs Oklahoma City Thunder - NBA - Basketball 2025-2026

programme.title: A.F.C. Bournemouth vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Bournemouth are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Manchester United, scoring more goals in these five than they did in their first 12 against the Red Devils in the division. programme.title: Newcastle United vs. Sunderland - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Newcastle are winless in their last five home league games against Sunderland, with this their first such meeting at St James’ Park since a 1-1 draw in March 2016. Sunderland are unbeaten in their last 10 league games against Newcastle, winning seven of the last eight. It’s the joint-longest run either side has had without defeat in the history of the fixture.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs. Sunderland - English Premier League 2026/2027

programme.title: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Brighton have won two of their last three home league games against Liverpool, beating them 3-2 in this exact fixture last season. They’d only won one of their first 13 against the Reds. Following their 2-0 win at Anfield in December, Liverpool are looking to complete the league double over Brighton for the first time since 2019-20.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs. Sunderland - English Premier League 2026/2027

programme.title: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Brighton have won two of their last three home league games against Liverpool, beating them 3-2 in this exact fixture last season. programme.title: Newcastle United vs. Sunderland - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Newcastle are winless in their last five home league games against Sunderland, with this their first such meeting at St James’ Park since a 1-1 draw in March 2016. Sunderland are unbeaten in their last 10 league games against Newcastle, winning seven of the last eight. It’s the joint-longest run either side has had without defeat in the history of the fixture.

programme.title: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: No player has scored more goals from outside the box than Liverpool’s Dominik Szoboszlai this season. All four of his strikes have been from direct free-kicks, with only David Beckham and Laurent Robert netting more in a single campaign. Only Jérémy Doku has had more successful dribbles in the Premier League this season than Brighton’s Yankuba Minteh.

programme.title: Switzerland vs Germany - International Friendly - 2026
programme.desc: In the 54 previous international matches between Switzerland and Germany, Germany have celebrated four times as many wins and scored more than twice as many goals as the Swiss. Germany have played more international matches against Switzerland than any other opponent, including their first ever international on 5th April 1908. Germany have also celebrated more wins against Switzerland than any other opponent, while Switzerland have lost more often against Germany than any other side, only facing Italy more times.

programme.title: Switzerland vs Germany - International Friendly - 2026
programme.desc: In the 54 previous international matches between Switzerland and Germany, Germany have celebrated four times as many wins and scored more than twice as many goals as the Swiss. Germany have played more international matches against Switzerland than any other opponent, including their first ever international on 5th April 1908. Germany have also celebrated more wins against Switzerland than any other opponent, while Switzerland have lost more often against Germany than any other side, only facing Italy more times.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Manchester City have lost three of their last four UEFA Champions League games against Real Madrid, as many defeats as they suffered against them through their first 12 meetings in the competition. Real Madrid are looking to eliminate Manchester City from the UEFA Champions League knockout stages for a fifth time ; only Bayern Munich have been eliminated by an opponent on more than five occasions in the knockout stages of the competition.

programme.title: Chelsea vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Chelsea are winless in their last five UEFA Champions League games against Paris SG ; their joint-longest winless run against an opponent in the competition. Paris SG are unbeaten in their last five games against English teams in the UEFA Champions League, and could go six in a row without defeat against them in the competition for the first time here.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Newcastle United- UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Barcelona have won both of their previous home games against Newcastle United in the UEFA Champions League, beating them 1-0 in November 1997 and 3-1 in December 2002. Newcastle have lost five of their six away games against Spanish sides in all competitions, with this their first since a 2-1 loss at Deportivo de La Coruña in the 2005 UEFA Intertoto Cup. The only exception in this run was a 3-0 win at Mallorca in the 2003-04 UEFA Cup.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Galatasaray - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Having been unbeaten in their first three UEFA Champions League meetings with Galatasaray, Liverpool have now lost their last three against the Turkish side, though all three defeats have come away from home. Galatasaray have won just one of their 12 away games against English teams in all competitions, winning 3-2 at Manchester United in October 2023.

Romania have only lost one of their last eight away games against Türkiye, except for a 2-0 friendly defeat in August 2010 which was the only visit they have failed to score duing this run.

programme.title: Switzerland vs Germany - International Friendly - 2026
programme.desc: In the 54 previous international matches between Switzerland and Germany, Germany have celebrated four times as many wins and scored more than twice as many goals as the Swiss. Germany have played more international matches against Switzerland than any other opponent, including their first ever international on 5th April 1908. Germany have also celebrated more wins against Switzerland than any other opponent, while Switzerland have lost more often against Germany than any other side, only facing Italy more times.

programme.title: Nice vs Paris Saint-Germain - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
programme.desc: Nice have picked up 11 points against Paris SG in the last five Ligue 1 seasons ; only Monaco and Rennes have gained more against them over that period. Nice have picked up 10 points in the 10 Ligue 1 matches since Claude Puel's appointment, which is the same amount as in the last 10 games managed by Franck Haise for les Aiglons in the top-flight.

programme.title: Nice vs Paris Saint-Germain - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27

programme.title: Olympique Lyonnais vs Monaco - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
programme.desc: Lyon and Monaco will face each other for the 119th time in Ligue 1, making it the second-most played fixture in the top-flight's history. Only Saint-Étienne vs Bordeaux has been played more often in Ligue 1. None of the last 21 matches between Lyon and Monaco in all competitions have ended in a draw. The last draw between the two sides was in October 2015.

programme.title: Switzerland vs Germany - International Friendly - 2026
programme.desc: In the 54 previous international matches between Switzerland and Germany, Germany have celebrated four times as many wins and scored more than twice as many goals as the Swiss. Germany have played more international matches against Switzerland than any other opponent, including their first ever international on 5th April 1908. Germany have also celebrated more wins against Switzerland than any other opponent, while Switzerland have lost more often against Germany than any other side, only facing Italy more times.

programme.title: England vs Japan - International Friendly - 2026
programme.desc: England are unbeaten in their three games against Japan, beating them 2-1 in both June 1995 in the Umbro Cup and in a May 2010 friendly, while they shared a 1-1 draw in June 2004. An Asian nation has never previously beaten England in 10 attempts – this is England’s first game against an Asian team since a 6-2 win over IR Iran in November 2022 at the FIFA World Cup.

programme.title: England vs Japan - International Friendly - 2026
programme.desc: England are unbeaten in their three games against Japan, beating them 2-1 in both June 1995 in the Umbro Cup and in a May 2010 friendly, while they shared a 1-1 draw in June 2004. An Asian nation has never previously beaten England in 10 attempts – this is England’s first game against an Asian team since a 6-2 win over IR Iran in November 2022 at the FIFA World Cup.

programme.title: M2 - ATP 250 - Tiriac Open, Bucharest Romania - 2026
programme.desc: An ATP 250 clay-court tournament held in Bucharest, Romania, played on outdoor red clay. Part of the European clay swing leading into Roland Garros, it features a 28-player singles draw and 16-team doubles. The event rewards strong baseline play, endurance, and tactical construction, with valuable ATP ranking points and a title at stake.

programme.title: Su-Wei HSIEH (TPE)/ Jelena OSTAPENKO (LAT) vs Anna DANILINA (KAZ) /Aleksandra KRUNIC (SRB) - Mini Ma
programme.desc: A cornerstone of the early-season WTA calendar, the Qatar TotalEnergies Open takes place on outdoor hard courts at the Khalifa International Tennis & Squash Complex in Doha. A 56-player singles draw competes for 1000 ranking points and a $4,088,211 USD total financial commitment, attracting the world’s top players.

programme.title: M1 - Day 1 - ATP 250 Fayez Sarofim & Co. U.S. Men’s Clay Court Championship
programme.desc: Staged in Houston, this is the only ATP clay event in North America and is played on American green clay, which is faster and lower bouncing than European red clay. The conditions favor big servers and first-strike tennis, making it a unique transition event into the clay-court season.

Part of the European clay swing leading into Roland Garros, it features a 28-player singles draw and 16-team doubles. The event rewards strong baseline play, endurance, and tactical construction, with valuable ATP ranking points and a title at stake.

programme.title: M1 - Day 4 - ATP 250 Fayez Sarofim & Co. U.S. Men’s Clay Court Championship
programme.desc: Staged in Houston, this is the only ATP clay event in North America and is played on American green clay, which is faster and lower bouncing than European red clay. The conditions favor big servers and first-strike tennis, making it a unique transition event into the clay-court season.

programme.desc: La Liga 2 is the men's second professional association football division of the Spanish football league system. It is contested by 22 teams, with the top two teams plus the winner of a play-off promoted to La Liga and replaced by the three lowest-placed teams in that division.

programme.title: Aix vs Nantes - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Al-Duhail vs Al Arabi - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W16
programme.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

programme.title: Nimes vs Paris - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Aix vs Nantes - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Latvia vs Gibraltar - UEFA Nations League 2026/27 - Play Off 2ED Leg
programme.desc: The UEFA Nations League 2026/27 play-offs, newly added for this season, determine which of the 20 participating teams will be promoted, relegated or remain in their respective leagues for the 2026–27 season. The play-offs complement the automatic promotion and relegation already decided during the league phase of the competition.

programme.title: Andorra vs Málaga - LaLiga Hypermotion 2025-2026 - Spanish La liga 2
programme.desc: La Liga 2 is the men's second professional association football division of the Spanish football league system. It is contested by 22 teams, with the top two teams plus the winner of a play-off promoted to La Liga and replaced by the three lowest-placed teams in that division.

programme.title: Luxembourg vs Malta - UEFA Nations League 2026/27 - Play Off 2ED Leg
programme.desc: The UEFA Nations League 2026/27 play-offs, newly added for this season, determine which of the 20 participating teams will be promoted, relegated or remain in their respective leagues for the 2026–27 season. The play-offs complement the automatic promotion and relegation already decided during the league phase of the competition.

programme.title: Slovakia vs Romania - International Friendly - 2026
programme.desc: International friendly fixture that provides the team managers with the opportunity to experiment with team selection and tactics before actual qualification fixture or the tournament proper. Also, the match allows the manager to assess the abilities of players they may potentially select for tournament squads.

programme.title: Austria vs Korea Republic - International Friendly - 2026
programme.desc: Austria and South Korea are meeting for the first time in an international match. South Korea's squad includes Tae-Seok Lee, a familiar player who is a regular for FK Austria Wien. Austria are unbeaten in their last 12 home matches, equalling their national record, previously achieved between 1971 and 1975 and 1922 and 1925. The ÖFB team could now set a new record, 124 years after their very first match in Vienna.

programme.title: One Friday Fights -149
programme.desc: ONE Friday Fights 149 brings another thrilling night of Muay Thai, MMA, and kickboxing to Bangkok’s iconic Lumpinee Stadium on April 3. In the main event, Tomyamkoong looks to build on his dramatic bonus-winning victory against Bejenuta Maximus, who arrives after impressing in Europe. In the co-main event, Isannuea puts his perfect knockout record on the line against the unbeaten Khunpon, plus more explosive matchups.

programme.title: One Friday Fights -149

In the co-main event, Isannuea puts his perfect knockout record on the line against the unbeaten Khunpon, plus more explosive matchups.
